prompt: A garden with only tall oak trees in similar style of the image.
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork of a garden scene. The garden should exclusively feature tall, mature oak trees, replacing all other types of trees and prominent shrubs depicted in image 1. The scene must maintain the compositional layout, artistic style, warm autumnal color palette, and soft lighting of image 1, including elements such as the paved pathway, scattered fallen leaves, and distant background structures.
objects: Original non-oak tree types (should not be present)
